name: kape
description: A dark color scheme rooted in coffee, earth, and amber.

scripts.validate: node --input-type=module <<< "import Ajv from 'ajv'; import schema from './resources/colors.schema.json' assert { type: 'json' }; import palette from './colors.json' assert { type: 'json' }; const ajv = new Ajv(); const valid = ajv.validate(schema, palette); if (!valid) { console.error(ajv.errors); process.exit(1); } console.log('✅ colors.json is valid');"
